scripts.test:golden: uv --directory apps/worker run pytest tests/test_golden_tiktok.py tests/test_golden_platforms.py tests/test_vote_engine.py -q
scripts.worker:gen: uv --directory apps/worker run datamodel-codegen --input ../../packages/contracts/schema/messages.schema.json --input-file-type jsonschema --output fastcheck_worker/_contracts_gen.py --output-model-type pydantic_v2.BaseModel --target-python-version 3.12 --use-standard-collections --use-annotated
scripts.worker:check: pnpm worker:lint && pnpm worker:typecheck && pnpm worker:test
